---
title: db2pq
---

# Export PostgreSQL and WRDS data to Parquet

`db2pq` is a Python package for moving data between WRDS, PostgreSQL, and
Parquet-centered local workflows.

The documentation site is organized around the main paths people take through
the package:

- [Data management ideas](data-management.qmd): package-focused guidance adapted
  from a longer note on managing research datasets.
- [WRDS to PQ](wrds-to-pq.qmd): export WRDS tables into Parquet files and keep
  them up to date.
- [WRDS to PG](wrds-to-pg.qmd): mirror WRDS tables into a PostgreSQL database.
- [Other PG to PQ](pg-to-pq.qmd): export tables from non-WRDS PostgreSQL
  databases to Parquet.
- [PQ to PG](pq-to-pg.qmd): current status of Parquet-to-PostgreSQL support.
- [API Reference](reference/index.qmd): generated function reference from
  docstrings.

## Install

```bash
pip install --upgrade db2pq
```

Optional extras:

```bash
pip install --upgrade "db2pq[sas]"
pip install --upgrade "db2pq[pandas]"
pip install --upgrade "db2pq[ibis]"
pip install --upgrade "db2pq[adbc]"
```

## Quick example

```python
from db2pq import wrds_update_pq

wrds_update_pq("dsi", "crsp")
```

## Reference generation

This site uses `quartodoc` for API pages and Quarto for rendering.
